mapper.insert: insert into sys_logininfor (user_name, status, ipaddr, login_location, browser, os, msg, login_time, event_type, risk_level, biz_category, highlight_tag) values (#{userName}, #{status}, #{ipaddr}, #{loginLocation}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{msg}, sysdate(), #{eventType}, #{riskLevel}, #{bizCategory}, #{highlightTag})
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_logininfor where info_id in
#{infoId}
